roa.docketEntryComment: PROB TRANSFER TO SOLANO COUNTY SENT

/CAL: APD 1203,9PC  MOTION TO TRANSFER PROBATION FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTYTO SOLANO COUNTY/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO SOLANO COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL:TO SET DA MTR/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA:01-26-16/TWS/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ:7 D/CTS:7/4019HALF/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANT MUST PARTICIPATE IN ONE SUBSTANCE ABUSE COUNSELLING SESSION AT LEAST ONCE A WEEK, FOR THE NEXT SIX MONTHS/SA1:STAY AWAY 150 YARDS FROM IGNACIO PALOMARIA/SAORD/PROB TERM:10-27-20/OBEY/ACCEP/

/CAL:APD MOTION TO MODIFY RESTITUTION/X:APD HAS DETERMINED THAT THERE IS NO RESTITUTION OWED,/X:ALL ORIGINAL TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN,/X:COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION FOR ANY FUTURE RESTITUTION CLAIMS,/

/CAL:SENTENCE/AJW/CH2:ISS:PROB 5 Y:PJ 2D/CTS:2/24MREVIEW/DNACOMP/IND/WS/WEAP/RESTV/SAORD/SA1: MEI W, & DAZHAO LIU/SAORD2/SA2: 188 ELMIRA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO/SAORD3/VF4:300/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/X:AS TO COUNT 4, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO 4 DAYS IN COUNTY JAIL WITH 4 DAYS CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED,/VF2:150/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/BE/X:UPON SUCCESSFULCOMPLETION OF ONE YEAR PROBATION & PROPER FILING OF MOTION, COUNT 6 MAY BEREDUCED TO MISDEMEANOR PURSUANT TO NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION,/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/AMEND:TO REDUCE COUNT 4 TO PC 368(B)1, MISDEMEANOR PURSUANT TO PC 17(B), AND TO ADD COUNT 6, PC 245(A)(4), FELONY/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:4 & 6/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:10-28-15/REMA/ARBUCKLE/TWS/CONTD:SENTENCE/DOP/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X:COURT CONDUCTS IN-CAMERA REVIEW OF SUBPOENAEDRECORDS AND RELEASES THE RECORDS TO THE RESPECTIVE PARTIES BY STIPULATION,/LD:10-06-15 (60TH)/TE:3-4 HOURS/CONTD:FURTHER PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 09-24-15 & PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 09-28-15/DOP/

/CAL:STATUS/X:OFFICE OF THE PUBLIC DEFENDER IS RELIEVED AND SUBSTITUTION OF PRIVATE COUNSEL IS GRANTED,/NTW60/LD:10-06-15/VD:PRELIMINARY HEARING OF08-19-15/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 08-19-15 & PRELIMINARY HEARING ON09-28-15/DOP/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX: 08-21-15/BAIL:100000     /TE:HALF DAY/SAORD/SA1:MEI W, (AF 11-27-44); DAZHAO L (AM 10-20-70)/SA2:188 ELMIRA STREET, SF, CA 94124/SAORD3/CONTD:STATUS/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/
/CAL:DA 1203,2PC MOTION/PD/WIAMTR/PROB ADM REV/SHER/NB/CONTD:TO SET DA MTR/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: PRELIMINARY HEARING VACATED ON 09-24-15/
